creator: joe@zircon.seattle.wa.us
text:
Did you remove the architecture restriction and attempt to compile on 
sparc64 as I requested?

I do not have access to sparc64 but Glenn Fowler believes that it should 
work.  Please remove the architecture restriction and test it.  If it 
works, we can just leave the restriction off.  If it doesn't work, I can 
forward errors to Glenn.

/Joe
